runtime.dependencies: standard-library-only; git required for extension installation

extensions.name: PPT Image First
extensions.best_for: default standard PPT route, high-fidelity visual pages, image-first deck, style previews, image-level retouch

extensions.name: Guizang PPT Skill
extensions.best_for: main text, speech content, storytelling, animation, single-file HTML deck, magazine style, Swiss style, talks, covers, image prompts

extensions.name: PPT Master
extensions.best_for: natively editable PPTX, real PowerPoint shapes, native animations, PowerPoint object-level editing, SVG-to-PPTX export
